Fig. 2: Comparison of an RGB camera image versus a LiDAR point cloud for the same crowded scene generated using a simulator. LiDAR eliminates people’s faces and identifying features from collected data, preserving individual privacy in monitored areas.

Fig. 5: High-level, integrated taxonomy of LiDAR-based crowd management systems illustrating the relationships between point cloud types, crowd descriptors, analytical methods, core tasks, decision-making components, and application domains.
